Khavatary Arena:
Orc warriors are strong and skilled... But these qualities can't be easily obtained.
Combat mastery for Khavat is an art that can be learned for all your life. You have to train very hard, only then you can achieve good results.
The one who understands mastery of Khavat can be called Monk. The one who understand that every moment of your life is Khavat can be called Hermit.
Also above all of them there is a forgotten power locked by many seals. Yes, that power was forgotten... For long years there was no one who could master it. Oh, so long... too long...
